creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, I'm starving. You wanna go to Zaxby's for lunch? Yeah, I'm down. I'll just get the grilled chicken sandwich lettuce wrap, then we'll add an extra grilled chicken breast. Let's do a side salad with the light balsamic vinaigrette and a Coke Zero. Oh, damn. I would have never even thought to order like that. Bro, are you not following Seth G. yet? Well, shit, I better follow Seth G. right now.
caption:
You're not FAT because you eat fast food, it's because how you order

Next time you go to Zaxbys order this:

Grilled chicken sandwich (lettuce wrapped) + extra grilled fillet + side salad with light balsamic vinaigrette + Coke Zero
(610 calories 66 G protein)

This will help you save over 1000 calories and keep you on track with your fitness journey

Save for later

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps

#macrofriendly #fitover40
ocr_summary: Zaxby's: 1870 cal / 72g protein (original) vs 610 cal / 66g protein (swap).

swaps.original_meal: Standard Zaxby's meal (fried chicken sandwich + fries + soda)
swaps.swap_meal: Grilled chicken sandwich (lettuce wrapped) + extra grilled fillet + side salad with light balsamic vinaigrette + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Single Zaxby's swap. Strategy: grilled instead of fried, lettuce wrap instead of bun, side salad instead of fries, diet drink. Saves 1260 calories with only 6g less protein.
